published.text:
### Hero
Heading: Best AI Automations for Service Businesses
Body: The best AI automation for a service business is instant lead response - replying to every inquiry within 60 seconds via SMS or voice. In real deployments, this single automation increases lead-to-booking conversion by 30-50% because most competitors take hours to respond or never follow up at all. Below is a decision framework, not a product list, that maps five proven automations to specific service-business bottlenecks, with cost ranges, ROI timelines, and implementation order based on results across HVAC, restaurant, dental, legal, property management, and e-commerce companies.
Sub: Below: a fit/not-fit evaluation, a bottleneck router so you start with the right automation, a decision matrix ranked by impact and setup cost, two real-world case studies with measurable outcomes, and direct links to industry-specific and workflow-specific guides.

### Core sections
- The five automations that actually move the needle
- Is your business a fit for AI automation?
- Start here: match your biggest bottleneck to a workflow
- Decision matrix: which automation to start with
- Which automation fits your situation
- The right implementation order
- What to skip and why

### New routing block
- Slow lead response (most common): routes into instant lead response, missed-call text-back, and AI phone answering setup
- Booking friction and no-shows: routes into AI appointment setter, no-show reduction, and appointment-setter cost
- Stale database and dormant past customers: routes into client reactivation, HVAC database reactivation proof, and lead-follow-up examples

### FAQ
Subhead: Practical answers about AI automation for service businesses
Topics: how much a small service business should budget for AI automation, whether a CRM change is required, what can realistically be built DIY versus what should be built properly, and what results to expect in the first 30 days.

### Final CTA
Heading: Want to identify your highest-ROI automation?
Body: Book a 30-minute call. We'll look at where you're losing leads, identify which automation would have the biggest impact, and map out a realistic implementation plan.

edits.description: Bounded refresh for a discovered-not-indexed commercial page, not a new page.
Lead with the highest-ROI answer first, then route by bottleneck.
Copy stays practical and buyer-facing: no generic AI hype, no listicle framing.
New section strengthens internal linking into real workflow pages, proof pages, and commercial child pages without pretending every service business needs the same system first.
Proof framing stays honest by using the HVAC reactivation example and existing workflow guides instead of inventing new case studies.
